light.label: Light

dark.label: Dark

ocean.label: Ocean

high-contrast.label: High contrast

section.description: Page section with responsive vertical rhythm.

accent.css: .wb-section { padding-block: clamp(2.5rem, 7vw, 6rem); } .wb-section-accent { background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-contrast); }

fullscreen.css: .wb-section-fullscreen { min-height: 100svh; display: grid; align-content: center; padding-block: 2rem; }

vertical.css: .wb-stack { display: flex; gap: var(--stack-gap, 1rem); } .wb-stack-vertical { flex-direction: column; }

horizontal.css: .wb-stack { display: flex; gap: var(--stack-gap, 1rem); } .wb-stack-horizontal { align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }

centered.css: .wb-stack-centered { flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center; }

two.css: .wb-grid { display: grid; gap: 1.5rem; } .wb-grid-two { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); } @media (max-width: 45rem) { .wb-grid-two { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

three.css: .wb-grid { display: grid; gap: 1.5rem; } .wb-grid-three { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); } @media (max-width: 60rem) { .wb-grid-three { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 38rem) { .wb-grid-three { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

auto.css: .wb-grid { display: grid; gap: 1.5rem; } .wb-grid-auto { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(100%, 16rem), 1fr)); }

four.css: .wb-grid { display: grid; gap: 1.5rem; } .wb-grid-four { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr)); } @media (max-width: 70rem) { .wb-grid-four { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } } @media (max-width: 38rem) { .wb-grid-four { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

sidebar.css: .wb-grid { display: grid; gap: 1.5rem; } .wb-grid-sidebar { grid-template-columns: minmax(14rem, 1fr) minmax(0, 3fr); } @media (max-width: 48rem) { .wb-grid-sidebar { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

header.description: Site header with navigation and child components.

primary.html:
{{#content.logo}}{{/content.logo}}{{content.title}}
{{#content.nav}}{{text}}{{/content.nav}}
{{{children}}}
primary.css: .site-header-primary { background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-contrast); } .site-header-primary a { color: inherit; }

minimal.html:
{{content.title}}
{{#content.nav}}{{text}}{{/content.nav}}
{{{children}}}

transparent.html:
{{content.title}}
{{#content.nav}}{{text}}{{/content.nav}}
{{{children}}}
transparent.css: .site-header-transparent { position: absolute; inset: 0 0 auto; background: transparent; color: #fff; } .site-header-transparent a { color: inherit; }

header.css: .site-header { position: relative; z-index: 10; padding: .85rem 1rem; } .site-header__inner { width: min(100%, 72rem); margin: auto; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; } .site-header__brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .6rem; color: inherit; font-weight: 750; text-decoration: none; } .site-header__brand img { width: 2rem; height: 2rem; } .site-header nav { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .35rem 1rem; } .site-header nav a { text-decoration: none; } @media (max-width: 38rem) { .site-header__inner { align-items: flex-start; flex-direction: column; } }

horizontal.css: .wb-navbar-horizontal { display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1rem; }

mobile.css: .wb-navbar__toggle { padding: .55rem .8rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); } .wb-navbar__links { display: flex; gap: 1rem; } @media (max-width: 42rem) { .wb-navbar__links { display: none; flex-direction: column; padding-block: 1rem; } .wb-navbar-mobile.is-open .wb-navbar__links { display: flex; } }
mobile.js: document.querySelectorAll('.wb-navbar-mobile').forEach((nav) => { const toggle = nav.querySelector('.wb-navbar__toggle'); toggle?.addEventListener('click', () => { const open = nav.classList.toggle('is-open'); toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(open)); }); });

pills.css: .wb-navbar-pills { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .35rem; } .wb-navbar-pills a { padding: .45rem .75rem; border-radius: 999px; color: var(--text-muted); text-decoration: none; } .wb-navbar-pills a[aria-current='page'] { background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-contrast); }

hero.description: Hero banner with calls to action.

split.css: .wb-hero-split { grid-template-columns: 1.05fr .95fr; align-items: center; } .wb-hero-split > img { width: 100%; min-height: 18rem; max-height: 32rem; object-fit: cover; border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * 1.5); } @media (max-width: 48rem) { .wb-hero-split { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

hero.css: .wb-hero { display: grid; gap: clamp(1.5rem, 5vw, 4rem); padding: clamp(3rem, 9vw, 7rem) clamp(1rem, 4vw, 3rem); background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--surface), var(--surface-2)); } .wb-hero h1 { max-width: 18ch; margin: 0; font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 7vw, 5rem); line-height: 1.04; } .wb-hero__eyebrow { color: var(--primary); font-weight: 750; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .wb-hero__lead { max-width: 60ch; color: var(--text-muted); font-size: clamp(1.05rem, 2vw, 1.3rem); } .wb-hero__actions { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: inherit; gap: .75rem; margin-top: 1.5rem; }

button.description: Accessible button with visual, success, and icon variants.

primary.css: .wb-btn-primary { background: var(--primary); border-color: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-contrast); }

outline.css: .wb-btn-outline { background: transparent; border-color: var(--primary); color: var(--primary); }

ghost.css: .wb-btn-ghost { background: transparent; border-color: transparent; color: var(--primary); }

icon.css: .wb-btn-icon { width: 2.75rem; padding: 0; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-contrast); }

button.css: .wb-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: .5rem; min-height: 2.75rem; padding: .6rem 1rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: var(--radius); cursor: pointer; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; transition: transform .15s ease, filter .15s ease; } .wb-btn:hover:not(:disabled) { filter: brightness(1.08); transform: translateY(-1px); } .wb-btn:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--focus); outline-offset: 2px; } .wb-btn:disabled { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: .55; }
.wb-link-button { display: inline-flex; padding: .6rem 1rem; border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-contrast); font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; }

external.html: {{content.text}} ↗

elevated.css: .wb-card-elevated { background: var(--surface); border-color: transparent; box-shadow: var(--shadow); }

media.css: .wb-card-media { padding: 0; overflow: hidden; } .wb-card-media > img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 16 / 9; object-fit: cover; } .wb-card__body { padding: 1.25rem; }

horizontal.css: .wb-card-horizontal { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(8rem, 1fr) 2fr; align-items: center; gap: 1.25rem; } .wb-card-horizontal > img { width: 100%; height: 100%; min-height: 10rem; object-fit: cover; border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * .75); } @media (max-width: 36rem) { .wb-card-horizontal { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

interactive.css: .wb-card-interactive { background: var(--surface); cursor: pointer; transition: transform .18s ease, box-shadow .18s ease; } .wb-card-interactive:hover, .wb-card-interactive:focus-visible { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: var(--shadow); outline: none; }

card.css: .wb-card { padding: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); } .wb-card h2 { margin-top: 0; font-size: 1.25rem; } .wb-card p { color: var(--text-muted); }

alert.css: .wb-alert { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--alert-color), transparent 45%); border-left: .3rem solid var(--alert-color); border-radius: var(--radius); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--alert-color), transparent 90%); } .wb-alert p { margin: .25rem 0 0; } .wb-alert__close { align-self: flex-start; border: 0; background: transparent; color: inherit; cursor: pointer; font-size: 1.4rem; }

badge.css: .wb-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: .18rem .55rem; border-radius: 999px; font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 750; }

avatar.css: .wb-avatar { display: inline-block; object-fit: cover; background: var(--surface-2); }

image.description: Responsive image with an optional caption.

cover.css: .wb-image-cover img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 16 / 9; object-fit: cover; border-radius: var(--radius); }

circle.css: .wb-image-circle img { width: min(100%, 20rem); aspect-ratio: 1; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; }

image.css: .wb-image { margin: 0; } .wb-image figcaption { margin-top: .45rem; color: var(--text-muted); font-size: .875rem; }

input.description: Input field with a label and help text.
input.css: .wb-field { display: grid; gap: .4rem; } .wb-field > span { font-weight: 650; } .wb-field input, .wb-field textarea, .wb-field select { width: 100%; min-height: 2.75rem; padding: .6rem .75rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); } .wb-field input:focus, .wb-field textarea:focus, .wb-field select:focus { border-color: var(--focus); outline: 3px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--focus), transparent 70%); } .wb-field small { color: var(--text-muted); }

textarea.css: .wb-field { display: grid; gap: .4rem; } .wb-field > span { font-weight: 650; } .wb-field input, .wb-field textarea, .wb-field select { width: 100%; min-height: 2.75rem; padding: .6rem .75rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); } .wb-field input:focus, .wb-field textarea:focus, .wb-field select:focus { border-color: var(--focus); outline: 3px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--focus), transparent 70%); } .wb-field small { color: var(--text-muted); }

select.css: .wb-field { display: grid; gap: .4rem; } .wb-field > span { font-weight: 650; } .wb-field input, .wb-field textarea, .wb-field select { width: 100%; min-height: 2.75rem; padding: .6rem .75rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); } .wb-field input:focus, .wb-field textarea:focus, .wb-field select:focus { border-color: var(--focus); outline: 3px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--focus), transparent 70%); } .wb-field small { color: var(--text-muted); }

checkbox.css: .wb-check { display: inline-flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: .55rem; cursor: pointer; } .wb-check input { width: 1.1rem; height: 1.1rem; margin-top: .15rem; accent-color: var(--primary); }

radio-group.css: .wb-radio-group { display: grid; gap: .65rem; padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); } .wb-radio-group legend { padding-inline: .35rem; font-weight: 700; } .wb-radio-group label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem; } .wb-radio-group input { accent-color: var(--primary); }

inline.css: .wb-form-inline { flex-direction: row; align-items: end; flex-wrap: wrap; } .wb-form-inline > * { flex: 1 1 12rem; }

card.css: .wb-form-card { max-width: 42rem; padding: clamp(1rem, 4vw, 2rem); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface); box-shadow: var(--shadow); }

list.description: Simple list powered by a Mustache loop.

checklist.css: .wb-list-checklist { padding: 0; list-style: none; } .wb-list-checklist li { display: flex; gap: .55rem; } .wb-list-checklist li span { color: var(--success); font-weight: 800; }

table.description: Responsive table with nested headers, rows, and cells.
table.css: .wb-table-wrap { max-width: 100%; overflow-x: auto; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); } .wb-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; } .wb-table caption { padding: .75rem; font-weight: 700; text-align: left; } .wb-table th, .wb-table td { padding: .75rem; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); text-align: left; white-space: nowrap; } .wb-table th { background: var(--surface-2); }

pull.css: .wb-quote-pull { padding-inline: clamp(1rem, 6vw, 5rem); text-align: center; } .wb-quote-pull blockquote { font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 5vw, 3.2rem); }

quote.css: .wb-quote { margin: 0; padding: 1.25rem; border-radius: var(--radius); } .wb-quote blockquote { margin: 0; font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 3vw, 1.7rem); font-weight: 600; } .wb-quote figcaption { margin-top: .75rem; color: var(--text-muted); }

breadcrumb.css: .wb-breadcrumb ol { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .4rem; margin: 0; padding: 0; list-style: none; } .wb-breadcrumb li + li::before { content: '/'; margin-right: .4rem; color: var(--text-muted); } .wb-breadcrumb a { color: var(--primary); }

default.html: ‹{{#content.pages}}{{text}}{{/content.pages}}›

pagination.css: .wb-pagination { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .35rem; } .wb-pagination a { display: grid; min-width: 2.5rem; min-height: 2.5rem; place-items: center; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); color: var(--text); text-decoration: none; } .wb-pagination a[aria-current='page'] { border-color: var(--primary); background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-contrast); }

progress.css: .wb-progress { height: .75rem; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--surface-2); } .wb-progress span { display: block; height: 100%; border-radius: inherit; transition: width .3s ease; }

spinner.css: .wb-spinner { display: inline-block; width: 1.5rem; height: 1.5rem; border: .22rem solid var(--surface-2); border-top-color: var(--primary); border-radius: 50%; animation: wb-spin .8s linear infinite; } @keyframes wb-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .wb-spinner { animation-duration: 1.8s; } }

divider.css: .wb-divider { width: 100%; margin-block: 1.5rem; border: 0; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }

fullscreen.html:
{{content.title}}

{{#content.text}}

{{content.text}}

{{/content.text}}{{{children}}}
fullscreen.css: .wb-modal-fullscreen { width: 100vw; max-width: none; height: 100vh; max-height: none; border: 0; border-radius: 0; }

modal.css: .wb-modal { width: min(100% - 2rem, 38rem); padding: 0; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); box-shadow: var(--shadow); } .wb-modal::backdrop { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, .6); } .wb-modal__content { padding: 1.5rem; } .wb-modal__close { position: absolute; top: .65rem; right: .65rem; border: 0; background: transparent; color: inherit; font-size: 1.5rem; cursor: pointer; }
modal.js: document.querySelectorAll('.wb-modal').forEach((modal) => { modal.querySelector('.wb-modal__close')?.addEventListener('click', () => modal.close()); modal.addEventListener('click', (event) => { if (event.target === modal) modal.close(); }); }); document.querySelectorAll('[data-modal-open]').forEach((trigger) => trigger.addEventListener('click', () => document.getElementById(trigger.dataset.modalOpen)?.showModal()));

right.html:
{{content.title}}

{{{children}}}

left.html:
{{content.title}}

{{{children}}}

drawer.css: .wb-drawer { position: fixed; z-index: 50; top: 0; width: min(90vw, 24rem); height: 100dvh; padding: 1.5rem; background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); box-shadow: var(--shadow); transition: transform .25s ease; } .wb-drawer__close { float: right; border: 0; background: transparent; color: inherit; font-size: 1.5rem; }
drawer.js: document.querySelectorAll('.wb-drawer').forEach((drawer) => drawer.querySelector('.wb-drawer__close')?.addEventListener('click', () => { drawer.classList.remove('is-open'); drawer.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true'); })); document.querySelectorAll('[data-drawer-open]').forEach((trigger) => trigger.addEventListener('click', () => { const drawer = document.getElementById(trigger.dataset.drawerOpen); drawer?.classList.add('is-open'); drawer?.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false'); }));

right.html: {{#content.items}}{{text}}{{/content.items}}

dropdown.css: .wb-dropdown { position: relative; display: inline-block; } .wb-dropdown__toggle { padding: .6rem .9rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); } .wb-dropdown__menu { position: absolute; z-index: 30; top: calc(100% + .4rem); min-width: 12rem; padding: .4rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--bg); box-shadow: var(--shadow); } .wb-dropdown__menu a { display: block; padding: .5rem .65rem; border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * .7); color: var(--text); text-decoration: none; } .wb-dropdown__menu a:hover { background: var(--surface); }
dropdown.js: document.querySelectorAll('.wb-dropdown').forEach((root) => { const button = root.querySelector('.wb-dropdown__toggle'); const menu = root.querySelector('.wb-dropdown__menu'); button?.addEventListener('click', () => { const open = menu.hasAttribute('hidden'); menu.toggleAttribute('hidden', !open); button.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(open)); }); });

accordion.css: .wb-accordion { border-block: 1px solid var(--border); } .wb-accordion__item + .wb-accordion__item { border-top: 1px solid var(--border); } .wb-accordion h3 { margin: 0; } .wb-accordion h3 button { width: 100%; padding: 1rem 0; border: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--text); font-weight: 700; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; } .wb-accordion__panel { padding: 0 0 1rem; color: var(--text-muted); }
accordion.js: document.querySelectorAll('.wb-accordion__item').forEach((item) => { const button = item.querySelector('button'); const panel = item.querySelector('.wb-accordion__panel'); button?.addEventListener('click', () => { const open = button.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true'; button.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(!open)); panel?.toggleAttribute('hidden', open); }); });

{{#content.items}}{{/content.items}}

pills.html:
{{#content.items}}{{/content.items}}

{{/content.items}}
pills.css: .wb-tabs-pills .wb-tabs__list { padding: .3rem; border: 0; border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface-2); } .wb-tabs-pills [role='tab'] { border: 0; border-radius: calc(var(--radius) * .75); } .wb-tabs-pills [role='tab'][aria-selected='true'] { background: var(--bg); box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.12); }

tabs.css: .wb-tabs__list { display: flex; gap: .25rem; overflow-x: auto; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); } .wb-tabs [role='tab'] { padding: .7rem 1rem; border: 0; border-bottom: .2rem solid transparent; background: transparent; color: var(--text-muted); cursor: pointer; } .wb-tabs [role='tab'][aria-selected='true'] { border-bottom-color: var(--primary); color: var(--text); } .wb-tabs [role='tabpanel'] { padding-block: 1rem; }
tabs.js: document.querySelectorAll('.wb-tabs').forEach((root) => { const tabs = [...root.querySelectorAll('[role=tab]')]; const panels = [...root.querySelectorAll('[role=tabpanel]')]; tabs.forEach((tab, index) => tab.addEventListener('click', () => { tabs.forEach((item, i) => item.setAttribute('aria-selected', String(i === index))); panels.forEach((panel, i) => panel.toggleAttribute('hidden', i !== index)); })); });

toast.css: .wb-toast { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; width: min(100%, 24rem); padding: 1rem; border-left: .3rem solid var(--toast-color); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface); box-shadow: var(--shadow); } .wb-toast p { margin: .2rem 0 0; } .wb-toast button { border: 0; background: transparent; color: inherit; font-size: 1.3rem; }

inline.css: .wb-stats-inline { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--border); } .wb-stats-inline > div { flex: 1 1 10rem; border: 0; border-radius: 0; background: var(--surface); }

stats.css: .wb-stats { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(10rem, 1fr)); gap: 1rem; margin: 0; } .wb-stats > div { padding: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface); } .wb-stats dt { color: var(--text-muted); } .wb-stats dd { margin: .3rem 0; font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 4vw, 2.4rem); font-weight: 800; } .wb-stats small { color: var(--success); }

pricing.description: Pricing card with a feature list.

featured.css: .wb-pricing-featured { border: 2px solid var(--primary); box-shadow: var(--shadow); } .wb-pricing__label { display: inline-block; padding: .2rem .55rem; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-contrast); font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 700; }

pricing.css: .wb-pricing { position: relative; padding: 1.5rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface); } .wb-pricing__price { margin: .5rem 0; font-size: 2.2rem; font-weight: 800; } .wb-pricing__price small { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: .9rem; font-weight: 500; } .wb-pricing ul { display: grid; gap: .45rem; padding-left: 1.2rem; }

testimonial.description: Customer testimonial with an optional avatar.
testimonial.css: .wb-testimonial { margin: 0; padding: 1.5rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface); } .wb-testimonial blockquote { margin: 0 0 1rem; font-size: 1.1rem; } .wb-testimonial figcaption { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .7rem; } .wb-testimonial img { width: 2.75rem; height: 2.75rem; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; } .wb-testimonial figcaption span { display: grid; } .wb-testimonial small { color: var(--text-muted); }

footer.css: .wb-footer { display: grid; gap: 1.5rem; padding: clamp(2rem, 6vw, 4rem); border-top: 1px solid var(--border); background: var(--surface); } .wb-footer nav { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1rem; } .wb-footer section { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .4rem; } .wb-footer h2 { margin: 0 0 .4rem; font-size: 1rem; } .wb-footer a { color: var(--text-muted); }

video.css: .wb-video { margin: 0; } .wb-video video { width: 100%; border-radius: var(--radius); background: #000; } .wb-video figcaption { margin-top: .5rem; color: var(--text-muted); }

code-block.description: Code block with a language label.
code-block.css: .wb-code { margin: 0; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: #0d1526; color: #e5edff; } .wb-code figcaption { padding: .5rem .8rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #2d3b57; color: #a8b3cf; font-size: .8rem; } .wb-code pre { margin: 0; padding: 1rem; overflow-x: auto; } .wb-code code { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, monospace; }

details.css: .wb-details { border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); } .wb-details summary { padding: 1rem; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 700; } .wb-details > div { padding: 0 1rem 1rem; color: var(--text-muted); }

callout.css: .wb-callout { padding: 1rem 1.2rem; border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--callout-color), transparent 50%); border-radius: var(--radius); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--callout-color), transparent 92%); } .wb-callout p { margin: .35rem 0 0; }

masonry.css: .wb-gallery-masonry { columns: 3 15rem; display: block; } .wb-gallery-masonry figure { margin: 0 0 1rem; break-inside: avoid; }

featured.css: .wb-gallery-featured { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } .wb-gallery-featured figure:first-child { grid-row: span 2; } .wb-gallery-featured figure:first-child img { height: 100%; } @media (max-width: 40rem) { .wb-gallery-featured { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

gallery.css: .wb-gallery { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(13rem, 1fr)); gap: 1rem; } .wb-gallery figure { position: relative; margin: 0; overflow: hidden; border-radius: var(--radius); } .wb-gallery img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 4 / 3; object-fit: cover; } .wb-gallery figcaption { padding: .5rem; color: var(--text-muted); font-size: .85rem; }

carousel.description: Simple carousel with previous and next controls.

simple.html:
{{#content.slides}}

{{title}}

{{text}}

{{/content.slides}}

carousel.css: .wb-carousel { overflow: hidden; } .wb-carousel__track { display: flex; transition: transform .3s ease; } .wb-carousel__slide { min-width: 100%; padding: 1rem; } .wb-carousel__slide img { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 16 / 7; object-fit: cover; border-radius: var(--radius); } .wb-carousel__controls { display: flex; justify-content: end; gap: .5rem; margin-top: .6rem; } .wb-carousel__controls button { width: 2.6rem; height: 2.6rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); cursor: pointer; }
carousel.js: document.querySelectorAll('.wb-carousel').forEach((root) => { const track = root.querySelector('.wb-carousel__track'); const slides = root.querySelectorAll('.wb-carousel__slide'); let index = 0; root.querySelectorAll('[data-direction]').forEach((button) => button.addEventListener('click', () => { index = (index + Number(button.dataset.direction) + slides.length) % slides.length; track.style.transform = `translateX(-${index * 100}%)`; })); });

heading.description: Editorial heading levels and display styles.
heading.css: .wb-heading { margin: 0 0 .65em; color: var(--text); line-height: 1.15; text-wrap: balance; }

text.description: Paragraph with standard, lead, muted, small, and monospace styles.

cluster.description: Fluid horizontal group for tags, actions, or metadata.
cluster.css: .wb-cluster { display: flex; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: var(--cluster-gap, .75rem); }

aspect-box.description: Container that enforces an aspect ratio for its children.
aspect-box.css: .wb-aspect { overflow: hidden; } .wb-aspect > img, .wb-aspect > video, .wb-aspect > iframe { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }

glass.css: .wb-surface-glass { border-color: color-mix(in srgb, white, transparent 65%); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--surface), transparent 25%); backdrop-filter: blur(14px); }

surface.css: .wb-surface { padding: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 2rem); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface); }

banner.css: .wb-banner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1rem; padding: 1rem clamp(1rem, 4vw, 3rem); border-bottom: 3px solid var(--banner-color); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--banner-color), transparent 90%); } .wb-banner p { margin: .2rem 0 0; }

feature.description: Feature block with an icon or media.

media.css: .wb-feature-media { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(10rem, 1fr) 2fr; align-items: center; gap: 1.25rem; } .wb-feature-media img { border-radius: var(--radius); } @media (max-width: 38rem) { .wb-feature-media { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

feature.css: .wb-feature { padding: 1.25rem; } .wb-feature__icon { display: grid; width: 2.75rem; height: 2.75rem; place-items: center; border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-contrast); font-size: 1.35rem; } .wb-feature h2 { margin: .8rem 0 .3rem; font-size: 1.2rem; } .wb-feature p { margin: 0; color: var(--text-muted); }

logo-cloud.description: Responsive client or partner logo grid.
logo-cloud.css: .wb-logo-cloud { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(7rem, 1fr)); align-items: center; gap: 2rem; } .wb-logo-cloud img { max-width: 9rem; max-height: 3rem; margin: auto; object-fit: contain; filter: grayscale(1); opacity: .72; }

team-grid.css: .wb-team { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(12rem, 1fr)); gap: 1.5rem; } .wb-team article { text-align: center; } .wb-team img { width: 9rem; height: 9rem; margin: auto; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; } .wb-team h2 { margin: .75rem 0 .15rem; font-size: 1.1rem; } .wb-team p, .wb-team small { color: var(--text-muted); }

compact.css: .wb-timeline-compact li { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 1rem; padding-block: .55rem; } .wb-timeline-compact li::before { top: .9rem; }

timeline.css: .wb-timeline { position: relative; display: grid; gap: 1rem; margin: 0; padding: 0 0 0 1.4rem; border-left: 2px solid var(--border); list-style: none; } .wb-timeline li { position: relative; } .wb-timeline li::before { content: ""; position: absolute; top: .45rem; left: calc(-1.4rem - 6px); width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--primary); } .wb-timeline time { color: var(--primary); font-size: .8rem; font-weight: 700; } .wb-timeline h2 { margin: .2rem 0; font-size: 1.1rem; } .wb-timeline p { margin: 0; color: var(--text-muted); }

steps.css: .wb-steps { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; margin: 0; padding: 0; list-style: none; } .wb-steps li { display: flex; align-items: center; flex-direction: column; gap: .35rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; } .wb-steps li span { display: grid; width: 2rem; height: 2rem; place-items: center; border: 2px solid var(--border); border-radius: 50%; } .wb-steps .is-complete span, .wb-steps .is-current span { border-color: var(--primary); background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-contrast); } .wb-steps .is-current { color: var(--text); }

empty-state.description: Empty state with an illustration and action.
empty-state.css: .wb-empty { display: grid; justify-items: center; max-width: 34rem; margin-inline: auto; padding: clamp(2rem, 6vw, 4rem); text-align: center; } .wb-empty__icon { display: grid; width: 4rem; height: 4rem; place-items: center; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--primary); font-size: 2rem; } .wb-empty h2 { margin: 1rem 0 .35rem; } .wb-empty p { color: var(--text-muted); }

text.css: .wb-skeleton-text i { display: block; height: .8rem; margin-block: .55rem; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--surface-2); } .wb-skeleton-text i:last-child { width: 65%; }

card.css: .wb-skeleton-card { padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); } .wb-skeleton-card i { display: block; height: 9rem; border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface-2); } .wb-skeleton-card span { display: block; height: .8rem; margin-top: .75rem; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--surface-2); }

avatar.css: .wb-skeleton-avatar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .75rem; } .wb-skeleton-avatar i { width: 3rem; height: 3rem; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--surface-2); } .wb-skeleton-avatar span { width: 10rem; height: .8rem; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--surface-2); }

skeleton.css: .wb-skeleton > * { background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, color-mix(in srgb, white, transparent 60%), transparent) !important; background-size: 220% 100% !important; animation: wb-shimmer 1.4s infinite; } @keyframes wb-shimmer { to { background-position: -220% 0; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .wb-skeleton > * { animation: none; } }

switch.css: .wb-switch { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .65rem; cursor: pointer; } .wb-switch input { position: absolute; opacity: 0; } .wb-switch > span { position: relative; width: 2.8rem; height: 1.55rem; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--surface-2); transition: background .2s; } .wb-switch > span::after { content: ""; position: absolute; top: .2rem; left: .2rem; width: 1.15rem; height: 1.15rem; border-radius: 50%; background: white; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.25); transition: transform .2s; } .wb-switch input:checked + span { background: var(--primary); } .wb-switch input:checked + span::after { transform: translateX(1.25rem); } .wb-switch input:focus-visible + span { outline: 3px solid var(--focus); outline-offset: 2px; }

range.description: Numeric range control with a live value.
range.css: .wb-range { display: grid; gap: .5rem; } .wb-range > span { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-weight: 650; } .wb-range input { width: 100%; accent-color: var(--primary); }
range.js: document.querySelectorAll('.wb-range').forEach((root) => { const input = root.querySelector('input'); const output = root.querySelector('output'); input?.addEventListener('input', () => { output.textContent = input.value; }); });

file-dropzone.description: Native file input with drag-and-drop support.
file-dropzone.css: .wb-dropzone { display: grid; justify-items: center; gap: .35rem; padding: 2rem; border: 2px dashed var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface); text-align: center; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color .2s, background .2s; } .wb-dropzone.is-dragging { border-color: var(--primary); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary), transparent 92%); } .wb-dropzone input { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; opacity: 0; } .wb-dropzone__icon { font-size: 2rem; color: var(--primary); } .wb-dropzone small { color: var(--text-muted); }
file-dropzone.js: document.querySelectorAll('.wb-dropzone').forEach((root) => { const input = root.querySelector('input'); const help = root.querySelector('small'); ['dragenter','dragover'].forEach((name) => root.addEventListener(name, (event) => { event.preventDefault(); root.classList.add('is-dragging'); })); ['dragleave','drop'].forEach((name) => root.addEventListener(name, (event) => { event.preventDefault(); root.classList.remove('is-dragging'); })); root.addEventListener('drop', (event) => { if (event.dataTransfer?.files.length) { input.files = event.dataTransfer.files; help.textContent = `${event.dataTransfer.files.length} file(s) selected`; } }); input?.addEventListener('change', () => { if (input.files?.length) help.textContent = `${input.files.length} file(s) selected`; }); });

search-bar.description: Search field with a clear button.

default.html: <form class='wb-search {{class}}' action='{{content.action}}' role='search'><label class='sr-only' for='{{id}}-input'>{{content.label}}</label><input id='{{id}}-input' type='search' name='{{content.name}}' placeholder='{{content.placeholder}}'><button type='submit'>{{content.button_text}}</button><button class='wb-search__clear' type='button' aria-label='Clear search'>×</button></form>

search-bar.css: .wb-search { display: flex; align-items: stretch; max-width: 38rem; } .wb-search input { flex: 1; min-width: 0; padding: .65rem .8rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius) 0 0 var(--radius); background: var(--bg); color: var(--text); } .wb-search button { border: 0; background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-contrast); padding-inline: 1rem; } .wb-search__clear { border-left: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, white, transparent 70%) !important; border-radius: 0 var(--radius) var(--radius) 0; }
search-bar.js: document.querySelectorAll('.wb-search').forEach((root) => { const input = root.querySelector('input'); root.querySelector('.wb-search__clear')?.addEventListener('click', () => { input.value = ''; input.focus(); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); }); });

interactive.html: {{#content.stars}}{{/content.stars}}

readonly.html: ★★★★★
readonly.css: .wb-rating-readonly span { display: inline-block; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--warning) var(--rating), var(--surface-2) var(--rating)); color: transparent; background-clip: text; }

rating.css: .wb-rating { display: inline-flex; gap: .2rem; font-size: 1.7rem; } .wb-rating button { padding: 0; border: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--surface-2); cursor: pointer; } .wb-rating button.is-active { color: var(--warning); }
rating.js: document.querySelectorAll('.wb-rating-interactive').forEach((root) => { const input = root.querySelector('input'); const buttons = [...root.querySelectorAll('button')]; const paint = (value) => buttons.forEach((button) => button.classList.toggle('is-active', Number(button.dataset.value) <= value)); paint(Number(root.dataset.value)); buttons.forEach((button) => button.addEventListener('click', () => { const value = Number(button.dataset.value); input.value = String(value); root.dataset.value = String(value); paint(value); root.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('ratingchange', { detail: { value }, bubbles: true })); })); });

tooltip.description: Tooltip available on hover and focus.
tooltip.css: .wb-tooltip { position: relative; display: inline-block; border-bottom: 1px dotted currentColor; cursor: help; } .wb-tooltip [role='tooltip'] { position: absolute; z-index: 40; bottom: calc(100% + .5rem); left: 50%; width: max-content; max-width: 16rem; padding: .4rem .6rem; border-radius: .35rem; background: var(--text); color: var(--bg); font-size: .78rem; transform: translateX(-50%); opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity .15s; } .wb-tooltip:hover [role='tooltip'], .wb-tooltip:focus [role='tooltip'] { opacity: 1; }

popover.description: Contextual panel opened by a button.
popover.css: .wb-popover { position: relative; display: inline-block; } .wb-popover__toggle { padding: .6rem .9rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); } .wb-popover__panel { position: absolute; z-index: 40; top: calc(100% + .5rem); left: 0; width: min(20rem, 90vw); padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--bg); box-shadow: var(--shadow); } .wb-popover__panel h2 { margin-top: 0; font-size: 1rem; }
popover.js: document.querySelectorAll('.wb-popover').forEach((root) => { const button = root.querySelector('.wb-popover__toggle'); const panel = root.querySelector('.wb-popover__panel'); button?.addEventListener('click', () => { const open = panel.hasAttribute('hidden'); panel.toggleAttribute('hidden', !open); button.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(open)); }); document.addEventListener('click', (event) => { if (!root.contains(event.target)) { panel.setAttribute('hidden', ''); button.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false'); } }); });

cookie-banner.css: .wb-cookie { position: fixed; z-index: 100; right: 1rem; bottom: 1rem; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; width: min(calc(100% - 2rem), 46rem); padding: 1rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--bg); box-shadow: var(--shadow); } .wb-cookie p { margin: .25rem 0 0; color: var(--text-muted); } .wb-cookie__actions { display: flex; gap: .5rem; } .wb-cookie button { padding: .5rem .75rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); } .wb-cookie button[data-choice=accept] { background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-contrast); } @media (max-width: 42rem) { .wb-cookie { align-items: stretch; flex-direction: column; } }
cookie-banner.js: document.querySelectorAll('.wb-cookie').forEach((root) => { const key = root.dataset.storageKey; if (localStorage.getItem(key)) { root.remove(); return; } root.querySelectorAll('[data-choice]').forEach((button) => button.addEventListener('click', () => { localStorage.setItem(key, button.dataset.choice); root.remove(); document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('cookieconsent', { detail: { choice: button.dataset.choice } })); })); });

copy-button.description: Button that copies text to the clipboard.
copy-button.css: .wb-copy { display: inline-flex; padding: .5rem .75rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); cursor: pointer; }
copy-button.js: document.querySelectorAll('.wb-copy').forEach((button) => button.addEventListener('click', async () => { const original = button.textContent; try { await navigator.clipboard.writeText(button.dataset.copyText); button.textContent = button.dataset.successText; setTimeout(() => { button.textContent = original; }, 1500); } catch (error) { console.error('Clipboard unavailable', error); } }));

back-to-top.css: .wb-back-to-top { position: fixed; z-index: 30; right: 1rem; bottom: 1rem; display: grid; width: 3rem; height: 3rem; place-items: center; border: 0; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-contrast); box-shadow: var(--shadow); cursor: pointer; opacity: 0; transform: translateY(1rem); pointer-events: none; transition: opacity .2s, transform .2s; } .wb-back-to-top.is-visible { opacity: 1; transform: none; pointer-events: auto; }
back-to-top.js: document.querySelectorAll('.wb-back-to-top').forEach((button) => { const update = () => button.classList.toggle('is-visible', scrollY > 500); addEventListener('scroll', update, { passive: true }); update(); button.addEventListener('click', () => scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' })); });

counter.js: document.querySelectorAll('.wb-counter').forEach((element) => { const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => entries.forEach((entry) => { if (!entry.isIntersecting) return; observer.disconnect(); const target = Number(element.dataset.target); const duration = Number(element.dataset.duration); const start = performance.now(); const tick = (now) => { const progress = Math.min(1, (now - start) / duration); element.textContent = String(Math.round(target * (1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 3)))); if (progress < 1) requestAnimationFrame(tick); }; requestAnimationFrame(tick); })); observer.observe(element); });

countdown.css: .wb-countdown { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .75rem; } .wb-countdown > div { min-width: 5rem; padding: .8rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface); text-align: center; } .wb-countdown strong, .wb-countdown span { display: block; } .wb-countdown strong { font-size: 1.6rem; } .wb-countdown span { color: var(--text-muted); font-size: .7rem; text-transform: uppercase; }
countdown.js: document.querySelectorAll('.wb-countdown').forEach((root) => { const target = new Date(root.dataset.target).getTime(); const update = () => { let seconds = Math.max(0, Math.floor((target - Date.now()) / 1000)); const values = { days: Math.floor(seconds / 86400), hours: Math.floor(seconds / 3600) % 24, minutes: Math.floor(seconds / 60) % 60, seconds: seconds % 60 }; Object.entries(values).forEach(([unit, value]) => { const node = root.querySelector(`[data-unit=${unit}]`); if (node) node.textContent = String(value).padStart(2, '0'); }); if (seconds <= 0) clearInterval(timer); }; const timer = setInterval(update, 1000); update(); });

audio.css: .wb-audio { margin: 0; } .wb-audio audio { width: 100%; } .wb-audio figcaption { margin-top: .4rem; color: var(--text-muted); font-size: .85rem; }

iframe.css: .wb-iframe { overflow: hidden; aspect-ratio: 16 / 9; border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--surface-2); } .wb-iframe iframe { width: 100%; height: 100%; border: 0; }

social-links.css: .wb-social { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .5rem; } .wb-social a { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .35rem; padding: .45rem .65rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 999px; color: var(--text); text-decoration: none; } .wb-social a:hover { border-color: var(--primary); color: var(--primary); }

data-list.css: .wb-data-list { margin: 0; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); } .wb-data-list > div { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(8rem, 1fr) 2fr; gap: 1rem; padding: .7rem 1rem; } .wb-data-list > div + div { border-top: 1px solid var(--border); } .wb-data-list dt { color: var(--text-muted); } .wb-data-list dd { margin: 0; font-weight: 600; }

meter.css: .wb-meter { display: grid; gap: .4rem; } .wb-meter > span { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; } .wb-meter meter { width: 100%; height: 1rem; accent-color: var(--primary); }

kbd.css: .wb-kbd { display: inline-block; padding: .18rem .45rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-bottom-width: 3px; border-radius: .35rem; background: var(--surface); color: var(--text); font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: .82em; }

marquee.css: .wb-marquee { overflow: hidden; } .wb-marquee > div { display: flex; width: max-content; animation: wb-marquee 24s linear infinite; } .wb-marquee span { padding-inline: 2rem; white-space: nowrap; } @keyframes wb-marquee { to { transform: translateX(-50%); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .wb-marquee > div { animation-play-state: paused; } }

status-dot.description: Compact status with a colored indicator.
status-dot.css: .wb-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: .4rem; font-size: .875rem; } .wb-status::before { content: ""; width: .55rem; height: .55rem; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--surface-2); }

floating-action.css: .wb-fab { position: fixed; z-index: 30; right: 1.25rem; bottom: 1.25rem; display: grid; width: 3.5rem; height: 3.5rem; place-items: center; border: 0; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: var(--shadow); cursor: pointer; font-size: 1.5rem; transition: transform .15s; } .wb-fab:hover { transform: scale(1.06); }

skip-link.css: .wb-skip-link { position: fixed; z-index: 999; top: .5rem; left: .5rem; padding: .6rem .9rem; border-radius: var(--radius); background: var(--primary); color: var(--primary-contrast); transform: translateY(-180%); transition: transform .15s; } .wb-skip-link:focus { transform: none; }

class.sr-only: position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding: 0; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0); white-space: nowrap; border: 0;
class.truncate: overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap;
class.transition-colors: transition: color .2s ease, background-color .2s ease, border-color .2s ease;
